gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 approved the committed implementation diff with no blocking findings; reviewer verified backward-compatible profile records, default/override storage semantics, public exports, focused suites, and full pytest.
scope: document_kv_cache.model_profiles, model profile tests, README model-profile documentation
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_model_profiles.py -q; poetry run pytest tests/test_model_profiles.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q; poetry run pytest -q; poetry check; poetry install --dry-run; poetry build; git diff --check
what_changed: Add portable default K/V storage layout fields to model profiles and use them when deriving KV layouts.
why: Future Qwen3.5, MiniMax, and adapter-trained model bundles need profile-owned storage semantics so cache generators and serving adapters derive the same shared, separate, or interleaved K/V layout without caller-specific overrides.
